seoTitle: Cambridge Gardens vs Cambridge Plateau — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cambridge Gardens and Cambridge Plateau. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cambridge Gardens vs Cambridge Plateau: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cambridge Gardens and Cambridge Plateau.
heading: Cambridge Gardens vs Cambridge Plateau — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cambridge Gardens, New South Wales and Cambridge Plateau, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cambridge Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Cambridge Plateau (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cambridge Gardens or Cambridge Plateau safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cambridge Gardens has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Cambridge Plateau scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cambridge Gardens scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Cambridge Plateau scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cambridge Gardens or Cambridge Plateau?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cambridge Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
